wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Colorful Philosophers.png}} {{E|Colorful Philosophers|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Hive}}. == Options == Up to 3 options are shown, chosen from other characters' card pools (excluding your current character). Each option offers 3 card rewards (1 Common, 1 Uncommon, 1 Rare) from that character's pool: * {{Frame|Red}} {{TS|positive||Obtain 3 {{2|Ironclad}} cards.}} * {{Frame|Green}} {{TS|positive||Obtain 3 {{2|Silent}} cards.}} * {{Frame|Blue}} {{TS|positive||Obtain 3 {{2|Defect}} cards.}} * {{Frame|Pink}} {{TS|positive||Obtain 3 {{2|Necrobinder}} cards.}} * {{Frame|Orange}} {{TS|positive||Obtain 3 {{2|Regent}} cards.}} ===Interactions=== *If the player has {{R|Prismatic Gem||2}} and/or {{R|Dingy Rug||2}}: **If the player has {{R|Prismatic Gem||2}}, then regardless of the option chosen, the resulting card rewards will include cards from ''all'' the characters, including the current character. **If the player has {{R|Dingy Rug||2}}, the resulting card rewards will include {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless}} cards in addition to cards of the chosen color. **If the player has {{R|Prismatic Gem||2}} ''and'' {{R|Dingy Rug||2}}, then whichever [[Slay the Spire 2:Relics|Relic]] was picked up ''first'' will impose its respective card rewards modification, and the other will ''not''. ***E.g. if {{R|Prismatic Gem||2}} was picked up first, then the card rewards will include cards from ''all'' the characters, including the current character, but ''not'' include {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless}} cards. *{{R|Driftwood||2}} allows the card rewards to be rerolled. *{{R|Pael's Wing||2}} allows the card rewards to be sacrificed for an eventual [[Slay the Spire 2:Relics|Relic]]. *{{R|Wing Charm||2}} applies {{KW|Swift||2}} 1 to one of the cards in each reward. *{{R|Molten Egg||2}}, {{R|Toxic Egg||2}}, and {{R|Frozen Egg||2}} {{KW|Upgrade|upgrade}} their respective card types as intended. == Dialogue ==
Before you is a rather epic sight. You see 3 different colored statues towering over a dais, having a heated debate over the philosophical implications of color. As you listen in, you get a sense that the most important question at hand is which color truly is THE BEST. You chime in with your thoughts.
{{Frame|Done}}
Your opinion doesn't seem welcome, and the statues resume their unending debate.
== Unlocking == {{E|Colorful Philosophers|2}} is unlocked by the {{2|Timeline#The Spire|The Spire}} Epoch. [[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
